entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst);

params.dst: The path builder to receive the resulting fill path.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the resulting path is not empty; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Applies the paint's stroke and path effects to the source path and writes the result into the destination path builder.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix);

params.dst: The path builder to receive the resulting fill path.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the resulting path is not empty; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Applies the paint's stroke and path effects to the source path and writes the result into the destination path builder.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect);

params.cullRect: The cull rectangle; only the portion of the path within this rectangle is filled.
params.dst: The path builder to receive the resulting fill path.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the resulting path is not empty; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Applies the paint's stroke and path effects to the source path and writes the result into the destination path builder.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, float resScale);

params.dst: The path builder to receive the resulting fill path.
params.resScale: The resolution scale factor used to scale the stroke width.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the resulting path is not empty; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Applies the paint's stroke and path effects to the source path and writes the result into the destination path builder.
